description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on push events. The workflow should have three jobs: build-linux, build-macos, and build-windows, each running on a different environment (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest respectively). For each job, check out the code, install required dependencies, and run make. Additionally, for the build-windows job, build and zip the project, then upload the zip file as an artifact.
